q: Between the capillaries and the cells is a watery liquid called ___ fluid.
Most of the water from tissue fluid reenters capillaries by ___.
The ___ system consists of vessels similar to blood capillaries, which are sometimes called lymphatic capillaries.
The ___ carry fats from villi of the small intestine.
Swellings called ___ filter dead cells and bacteria before lymph passes back into the blood.
